mapper.sql: id, member_no, customer_no, login_id, password_hash, login_fail_count, password_change_required_yn, password_expire_at, name, email, mobile_no, member_status, lock_yn, withdraw_yn, channel_code, joined_at, last_login_at, description, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mbr_member ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM mbr_member WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mbr_member ( member_no, customer_no, login_id, password_hash, login_fail_count, password_change_required_yn, password_expire_at, name, email, mobile_no, member_status, lock_yn, withdraw_yn, channel_code, joined_at, last_login_at, description, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{customerNo}, #{loginId}, #{passwordHash}, COALESCE(#{loginFailCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{passwordChangeRequiredYn}, 'N'), #{passwordExpireAt}, #{name}, #{email}, #{mobileNo}, #{memberStatus}, #{lockYn}, #{withdrawYn}, #{channelCode}, COALESCE(#{joinedAt}, NOW()), #{lastLoginAt}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), #{updatedBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE mbr_member SET member_no = #{memberNo}, customer_no = #{customerNo}, login_id = #{loginId}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, login_fail_count = COALESCE(#{loginFailCount}, login_fail_count), password_change_required_yn = COALESCE(#{passwordChangeRequiredYn}, password_change_required_yn), password_expire_at = #{passwordExpireAt}, name = #{name}, email = #{email}, mobile_no = #{mobileNo}, member_status = #{memberStatus}, lock_yn = #{lockYn}, withdraw_yn = #{withdrawYn}, channel_code = #{channelCode}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, description = #{description}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mbr_member SET login_fail_count = login_fail_count + 1, updated_by = 'MBR_AUTH', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mbr_member SET login_fail_count = 0, last_login_at = NOW(), updated_by = 'MBR_AUTH', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mbr_member_login_history ( member_id, login_domain, member_no, customer_no, login_id, login_result, login_ip, user_agent, failure_reason, transaction_global_id, module_id, was_id, server_instance_id, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{loginDomain}, #{memberNo}, #{customerNo}, #{loginId}, #{loginResult}, #{loginIp}, #{userAgent}, #{failureReason}, #{transactionGlobalId}, #{moduleId}, #{wasId}, #{serverInstanceId}, 'MBR_AUTH', 'MBR_AUTH' )

INSERT INTO mbr_refresh_token ( member_id, member_no, login_domain, refresh_token_hash, transaction_global_id, expire_at, revoked_yn, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberNo}, #{loginDomain}, #{refreshTokenHash}, #{transactionGlobalId}, #{expireAt}, 'N', 'MBR_AUTH', 'MBR_AUTH' )
mapper.select: SELECT rt.refresh_token_hash AS refreshTokenHash, rt.member_id AS memberId, rt.member_no AS memberNo, rt.login_domain AS loginDomain, rt.expire_at AS expireAt, rt.revoked_yn AS revokedYn, rt.transaction_global_id AS transactionGlobalId, m.customer_no AS customerNo, m.login_id AS loginId FROM mbr_refresh_token rt JOIN mbr_member m ON m.id = rt.member_id WHERE rt.refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE mbr_refresh_token SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = NOW(), updated_by = 'MBR_AUTH', updated_at = NOW() WHERE refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash}
mapper.select: SELECT login_history_id AS historyId, login_domain AS loginDomain, member_no AS memberNo, customer_no AS customerNo, login_id AS loginId, login_result AS loginResult, login_ip AS loginIp, user_agent AS userAgent, failure_reason AS failureReason, transaction_global_id AS transactionGlobalId, module_id AS moduleId, was_id AS wasId, server_instance_id AS serverInstanceId, created_at AS occurredAt FROM mbr_member_login_history ORDER BY login_history_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
